movie.actors: Mark Wahlberg, Lauren Cohan, Iko Uwais, John Malkovich
movie.plot: An elite American intelligence officer, aided by a top-secret tactical command unit, tries to smuggle a mysterious police officer with sensitive information out of Indonesia.
movie.title: Mile 22
movie.writer: Lea Carpenter (screenplay by), Graham Roland (story by), Lea Carpenter (story by)
